parsedJson.summary: The screenshots show an unrelated alumni app landing page, so a roofing customer would not understand or trust that this is a Gold Coast roof repair business.

issues.title: Page appears to be for the wrong business
issues.what_observed: The top-left logo says "Alumniapp" with a graduation cap icon, and the hero headline says "THE APP WAY" instead of anything about roof repairs.
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching for roof repair on the Gold Coast would immediately think they clicked the wrong website and leave before looking for contact details.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A roofing site should show the business name, roof repair wording, and Gold Coast location in the first screen, with a visible phone number and service-focused headline.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the Alumniapp branding and app headline with "Roof Repair Gold Coast", a roof repair headline, Gold Coast service-area text, and a prominent click-to-call button.
issues.plain_explanation: 这个页面看起来像校友手机 App 的网站，不像修屋顶公司的官网。
issues.customer_impact: 客户从 Google 商家资料点进来后，通常几秒内判断是不是找对了地方；如果第一眼不像修屋顶公司，很可能直接返回搜索结果，电话咨询会被白白流失。

issues.title: Hero image has no roofing relevance
issues.what_observed: The main desktop hero uses a campus-style building background and a large smartphone mockup showing an alumni social feed.
issues.why_problem: People with a leaking or damaged roof want signs that the company handles roofing problems; an app screenshot creates confusion and weakens confidence.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The hero should show a real roof, tradesperson on a roof, storm-damaged tiles, or a before-and-after repair image from the Gold Coast area.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Use a full-width roofing photo in the hero, remove the phone mockup, and overlay a short service promise such as emergency roof leak repairs with a phone CTA.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页大图展示的是手机 App 和校园建筑，跟修屋顶完全没有关系。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户会用图片快速判断这家公司是否专业；图片不相关会让人怀疑网站是否真实，尤其是急着找人修漏水屋顶时更容易放弃。

issues.title: No phone number visible above the fold
issues.what_observed: The desktop header only shows navigation links like Home, Features, Demo, FAQs, and Contact Us; the mobile header only shows a hamburger menu with no phone button.
issues.why_problem: A roofing customer often wants to call quickly, especially for leaks or storm damage. If the phone number is hidden, they may choose another roofer whose number is easier to tap.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Desktop should show a top-right phone number button; mobile should show a sticky click-to-call button or phone icon visible without opening the menu.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a high-contrast "Call Now" button with the local phone number in the header and a sticky mobile call bar at the bottom of the screen.
issues.plain_explanation: 客户一打开页面看不到电话号码，手机端还要点菜单才可能找到联系方式。
issues.customer_impact: 很多本地搜索发生在手机上，约 70% 的本地搜索用户会直接拨打或访问商家；电话按钮不明显会把准备联系的人推给竞争对手。

issues.title: Navigation is for an app, not a roofer
issues.what_observed: The navigation labels are "Features", "Demo", "FAQs", and "Contact Us", which match a software product layout rather than roofing services.
issues.why_problem: A homeowner wants to quickly find roof leak repair, tile replacement, storm damage, and service areas. Generic app navigation makes the business feel unfinished or fake.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Navigation should include practical service paths such as Roof Leak Repairs, Tile Roof Repairs, Storm Damage, About, Reviews, and Contact.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the navigation around roofing services and local intent, keeping the menu short and prioritising emergency repair and contact actions.
issues.plain_explanation: 菜单内容像软件产品网站，不像屋顶维修公司的服务菜单。
issues.customer_impact: 客户找不到自己需要的服务，会以为这家公司不做相关工作；通常用户不会耐心研究，而是回到 Google 选择下一个商家。

issues.title: Mobile hero hides the actual message
issues.what_observed: On mobile, the large smartphone mockup fills almost the entire first screen, and only the small text "TIME TO GO" appears at the bottom edge.
issues.why_problem: A phone visitor cannot see what the business does or how to contact it without scrolling, which is a serious barrier for urgent local service searches.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile should lead with a compact roof repair headline, one supporting line, and two large tap targets: Call Now and Request Quote.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the oversized mockup on mobile and rebuild the first screen as a single-column roofing hero with headline, trust line, service area, and sticky call CTA.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机端首屏几乎全被手机模型占满，客户看不到修屋顶信息和联系按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 手机用户通常在 8 秒左右决定是否继续看；首屏没有说明业务和电话，会直接减少来自 Google 商家资料的来电。

issues.title: No local trust signals are visible
issues.what_observed: The visible area contains no reviews, licence details, years in business, local suburb coverage, warranty message, or emergency availability.
issues.why_problem: Roof repair is a high-trust service because customers are letting someone inspect an expensive part of their home. Without proof, the business feels risky.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: The first screen should include concise proof such as star rating, licensed and insured wording, Gold Coast suburbs served, workmanship warranty, and emergency response availability.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a trust strip directly under the hero CTA with review rating, licence or insurance claim, warranty, and Gold Coast coverage badges.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面上看不到评价、资质、保修、本地服务范围等让客户放心的信息。
issues.customer_impact: 修屋顶客单价高，客户更怕被骗或做坏；缺少信任证明会让本来愿意询价的人转去选择看起来更可靠的同行。

issues.title: Design feels old and templated
issues.what_observed: The hero uses a dark orange photo overlay, large all-caps white headline, bright cyan buttons, and stock-style illustrated icons below the fold.
issues.why_problem: A dated template makes the business look neglected, which can make visitors question whether the company is still active or professional.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A current local service design should use real job photos, restrained colours, clear spacing, readable service cards, and one strong action colour for calls and quote requests.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the app-template styling with a roofing-specific visual system: real roof imagery, dark charcoal text, white sections, one accent colour for CTAs, and practical service blocks.
issues.plain_explanation: 整体视觉像旧模板网站，颜色和图标都不像专业的本地服务公司。
issues.customer_impact: 网站看起来过时会让客户怀疑公司是否还在认真经营；这种不信任会降低询价和来电，尤其影响第一次接触的新客户。

positive_observations: The desktop header is uncluttered and easy to scan.
The CTA button colour stands out clearly against the dark hero background.
The mobile layout has a simple top bar with space for a stronger phone action.
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace all Alumniapp/app content with roofing-specific branding, headline, imagery, and Gold Coast service messaging.
2. Add a visible phone number and click-to-call CTA on desktop and mobile above the fold.
3. Add local trust proof: reviews, licence/insurance, warranty, emergency availability, and service-area coverage.
